events.message: Rolled ai-memory-svc to v6f8a0c2 (checkpoint write change)
CloudWatch WriteThrottleEvents > 0 on table pipeline-states (us-east-1): ProvisionedThroughputExceeded
ai-agent-svc outbound call rate to ai-memory 9x baseline (retry amplification)
Scaled up ai-agent-312 (innocent deploy near onset)

note: The ai-memory-svc rollout (v6f8a0c2) at 07:26 precedes onset; the DynamoDB WriteThrottleEvents breach fires at 07:31 BEFORE the ai-agent retry storm (07:33) and the ai-agent deploy at 07:34 (decoy). No node-level pressure; this is an AWS capacity-threshold breach.
